inputs.label: True Positives (TP)
inputs.businessContext: Number of correctly identified positive cases (e.g., defective products correctly flagged)

inputs.label: False Positives (FP)
inputs.businessContext: Number of incorrectly identified positive cases (e.g., good products flagged as defective)

inputs.label: True Negatives (TN)
inputs.businessContext: Number of correctly identified negative cases (e.g., good products correctly passed)

inputs.label: False Negatives (FN)
inputs.businessContext: Number of incorrectly identified negative cases (e.g., defective products missed)
